sections.content: In a modern corporate scenario, communication is the key to business. Whether it’s negotiating, motivating people or just passing any information. It becomes utmost important to have effective communication with both the internal as well as external customers to save important time, build trust and push up the bottom line. Impactful Business Communication is a two day experiential workshop that enables the participants to understand the importance of effective communication skills. It enables to communicate clearly and quickly, with effective persuasion and assertiveness. It also helps the participants to master communication through all the channels of business communication: like face to face interactions, emails and phone calls. The program is made highly interactive with the use of stories, video clips, games and roleplays.

content: Learn to listen actively before responding
Learn to frame both open ended and close ended questions to clarify the doubts
Make lasting impression by understanding the nuances of body language & speech
Identify the benefits and drawbacks of each of the channel of communication and use it relevant to the situation requirement
Learn the 4 C’s of communication : Clear, Concise, Complete and Courteous
Learn to influence people through effective communication
